c74object.name: skipsilence~
c74object.description: The skipsilence~ object plays audio from a specified buffer while automatically skipping over silent segments. Silence detection is performed on one-bar segments, using a noise floor of 0.00009. The object is responsive to changes in bar length, which is retrieved from an external buffer named 'bar'.

inlet.description: Accepts the play message followed by a buffer name to start playback.
Sets the playback mode: 0 (once), 1 (repeat), or 2 (stop). Stops and buffer changes are deferred until the beginning of the next bar.

outlet.description: The left channel of the audio buffer. If the buffer is mono, this is duplicated to the second outlet.
The right channel of the audio buffer (if stereo).
Continuously outputs the current playback position in milliseconds (0 if not playing).
Diagnostic and status messages (enabled by the log attribute).

method.name: play
method.digest: Start playback from the specified buffer
method.description: Begins playing the named buffer from the beginning, skipping any silent bars.

attr.name: log
attr.description: When enabled (1), the object will post detailed scanning and playback progress to the third outlet.
